description:
🕒 10:00–12:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-naguricanoe-sup/

SUP (stand-up paddleboarding) at Lake Naguri is a gentle eco-tour for body and mind. Glide across the water's surface in all seasons, feeling nature's quiet beauty while learning about Naguri's ecosystems and natural charm in an environmentally conscious way.

【Fee】4,000 yen per person (includes guide, insurance, SUP board rental)

【Capacity】5 people

【Guide】Certified NPO Naguri Canoe Workshop staff

【What to bring】Rash guard, swimsuit, board shorts, swim trunks, cropped leggings, or other water-friendly clothing you can move in freely. Life jackets provided.

【More info】Certified NPO Naguri Canoe Workshop: https://naguri-canoe.co.jp/
location: 集合 名栗カヌー工房（国際興業バス「ノーラ名栗・さわらびの湯」下車徒歩20分、または「河又名栗湖入口」下車25分）
summary: Beginners welcome! Hands-free SUP experience at Lake Naguri – a relaxing time in nature
